summary:
## Week in Review: 2026-03-02 to 2026-03-08

**One Nation** led search interest this week with an average score of 19.6.
The strongest combined search-and-sentiment score belonged to **One Nation**.

### Party Breakdown

- **Labor**: Avg interest 8.0 (-1.8% WoW), sentiment: neutral (-0.07)
- **Liberal**: Avg interest 9.0 (+12.5% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.31)
- **Greens**: Avg interest 5.6 (-4.9% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.33)
- **One Nation**: Avg interest 19.6 (-32.5% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.11)
